title: Issuance Calendar for Marketable Dated Securities for April - September 2026
description: In order to enable institutional and retail investors to plan their investments efficiently and to provide transparency and stability to the Government Securities Market, the Reserve Bank of India, in consultation with the Government of India, hereby, releases the indicative calendar for issuance of Government dated securities, including Sovereign Green Bonds (SGrBs), for the first half of the fiscal year 2026-27 (April 01, 2026 to September 30, 2026). The issuance calendar is as under: Calendar
